dict.string: $(DEVELOPMENT_LANGUAGE)
Go Connect
$(EXECUTABLE_NAME)
$(PRODUCT_BUNDLE_IDENTIFIER)
Go Connect
APPL
$(FLUTTER_BUILD_NAME)
$(FLUTTER_BUILD_NUMBER)
LaunchScreen
Main
We need camera access to take profile pictures and upload documents.
This app needs access to network service discovery to debug the app
We use background location access to help artists and users track service routes and ensure accurate arrival updates, even when the app is closed.
We require continuous location access for real-time order tracking.
Your Location is used to match you with nearby clients and providers
We need access to your media library to upload profile pictures and manage service-related media files.
We need microphone access for voice input field.
We need permission to save images to your gallery.
We need access to your photo library to select images for your profile.
We need your permission to send you notifications about important updates.
